mapper.insert: INSERT INTO donationrecord(user_id, shelter_id, amount, item_type,donated_at) VALUES (#{donateUserId},#{shelterId},#{amount},#{itemType},NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.donation_id AS donationId, d.user_id AS donateUserId, du.username AS donateUserName, d.shelter_id AS shelterId, s.name AS shelterName, s.user_id AS shelterUserId, su.username AS shelterUserName, d.amount, d.item_type AS itemType, d.donated_at AS donatedAt, s.address AS shelterAddress, s.contact_info AS shelterContactInfo FROM donationrecord d JOIN strayanimalrescue.shelter s on d.shelter_id = s.shelter_id JOIN strayanimalrescue.user du on d.user_id = du.user_id JOIN strayanimalrescue.user su on s.user_id = su.user_id WHERE donation_id = #{donationId}

SELECT d.donation_id AS donationId, d.user_id AS donateUserId, du.username AS donateUserName, d.shelter_id AS shelterId, s.name AS shelterName, s.user_id AS shelterUserId, su.username AS shelterUserName, d.amount, d.item_type AS itemType, d.donated_at AS donatedAt, s.address AS shelterAddress, s.contact_info AS shelterContactInfo FROM donationrecord d JOIN strayanimalrescue.shelter s on d.shelter_id = s.shelter_id JOIN strayanimalrescue.user du on d.user_id = du.user_id JOIN strayanimalrescue.user su on s.user_id = su.user_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT d.donation_id AS donationId, d.user_id AS donateUserId, du.username AS donateUserName, d.shelter_id AS shelterId, s.name AS shelterName, s.user_id AS shelterUserId, su.username AS shelterUserName, d.amount, d.item_type AS itemType, d.donated_at AS donatedAt, s.address AS shelterAddress, s.contact_info AS shelterContactInfo FROM donationrecord d JOIN strayanimalrescue.shelter s on d.shelter_id = s.shelter_id JOIN strayanimalrescue.user du on d.user_id = du.user_id JOIN strayanimalrescue.user su on s.user_id = su.user_id WHERE d.shelter_id = #{shelterId}
